fields.name: client_id
fields.title: Client ID
fields.description: Your HubSpot OAuth2 Client ID

fields.name: client_secret
fields.title: Client Secret
fields.description: Your HubSpot OAuth2 Client Secret

fields.name: refresh_token
fields.title: Refresh Token
fields.description: Your HubSpot OAuth2 Refresh Token

fields.name: access_token
fields.title: Access Token
fields.description: Your HubSpot OAuth2 Access Token (optional if refresh_token is provided)

fields.name: private_app_token
fields.title: Private App Token
fields.description: Access token from a HubSpot Private App

custom_description:
HubSpot is a CRM platform that provides tools for marketing, sales, customer service,
and content management. This connector provides access to contacts, companies, deals,
tickets, and custom objects for customer relationship management and sales analytics.
supported_questions:
- List recent deals
- List recent tickets
- List companies in my CRM
- List contacts in my CRM
- Show me all deals from {company} this quarter
- What are the top 5 most valuable deals in my pipeline right now?
- Search for contacts in the marketing department at {company}
- Give me an overview of my sales team's deals in the last 30 days
- Identify the most active companies in our CRM this month
- Compare the number of deals closed by different sales representatives
- Find all tickets related to a specific product issue and summarize their status

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to display per page.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The paging cursor token of the last successfully read resource will be returned as the paging.next.after JSON property of a paged response containing more results.

parameters.name: associations
parameters.description: A comma separated list of associated object types to include in the response. Valid values are contacts, deals, tickets, and custom object type IDs or fully qualified names (e.g., "p12345_cars").

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: A comma separated list of the properties to be returned in the response. If any of the specified properties are not present on the requested object(s), they will be ignored.

parameters.name: propertiesWithHistory
parameters.description: A comma separated list of the properties to be returned along with their history of previous values. If any of the specified properties are not present on the requested object(s), they will be ignored. Usage of this parameter will reduce the maximum number of companies that can be read by a single request.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Whether to return only results that have been archived.

objects.description: Read an Object identified by {objectId}. {objectId} refers to the internal object ID by default, or optionally any unique property value as specified by the idProperty query param. Control what is returned via the properties query param.

fields.name: archived
fields.description: Indicates whether the company has been deleted and moved to the recycling bin

fields.name: contacts
fields.description: Associated contact records linked to this company

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the company record was created

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the company record

fields.name: properties
fields.description: Object containing all property values for the company

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the company record was last modified

fields.name: archived
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the contact has been archived or deleted.

fields.name: companies
fields.description: Associated company records linked to this contact.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the contact was first created in the system.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the contact record.

fields.name: properties
fields.description: Key-value object storing all contact properties and their values.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the contact record was last modified.

fields.name: archived
fields.description: Indicates whether the deal has been deleted and moved to the recycling bin

fields.name: companies
fields.description: Collection of company records associated with the deal

fields.name: contacts
fields.description: Collection of contact records associated with the deal

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the deal record was originally created

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the deal record

fields.name: line_items
fields.description: Collection of product line items associated with the deal

fields.name: properties
fields.description: Key-value object containing all deal properties and custom fields

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the deal record was last modified

fields.name: archived
fields.description: Indicates whether the ticket has been deleted and moved to the recycling bin

fields.name: companies
fields.description: Collection of company records associated with the ticket

fields.name: contacts

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the ticket record was originally created

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the ticket record

fields.name: properties
fields.description: Key-value object containing all ticket properties and custom fields

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the ticket record was last modified
